stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with her own beliefs, even when that conflicts with the position of her party.
substantive: She supports the building of the new HS2 railway between major UK cities.
justification: In political debates, she regularly emphasises the benefits of her political positions for people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “In a democracy, the voter has the last word. That is why I always listen and respond to what voters want.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with her own beliefs, even when that conflicts with the position of her party. She supports the building of the new HS2 railway between major UK cities. In political debates, she regularly emphasises the benefits of her political positions for people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “In a democracy, the voter has the last word. That is why I always listen and respond to what voters want.”
